Title: Automate Daily Report Generation
Problem Statement: Manual report generation takes 2 hours daily and is error-prone
Proposed Solution: Implement automated Python script with scheduled execution
Actual Solution Implemented: Created scheduled task with Python automation using pandas and email integration

Problem Statement: Customers wait 30+ minutes for support during peak hours
Proposed Solution: Deploy GPT-based chatbot for handling common customer queries
Actual Solution Implemented: Integrated ChatGPT API with custom training on company knowledge base

Title: Streamline Approval Workflow

Remarks: Approval time reduced by 60% from 5 days to 2 days

Title: Implement Database Monitoring Solution

Actual Solution Implemented: Configured Prometheus and Grafana monitoring with custom alerting rules

Remarks: 99.9% uptime achieved with 50% reduction in incidents

Remarks: 95% user adoption rate within first month
